---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new workflow
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?
Describe the workflow limitation or missing capability.

## Proposed solution
How you'd like it to work (command syntax, expected behavior).

## Alternatives considered
Any workarounds you've tried.

## Additional context
Links, screenshots, or references to similar features in other tools.
